data.name: Lonely Christmas: Sadistic Santa
data.detailed_description:
You're feeling a bit down as you're spending your first Christmas alone, but (luckily?) you realize that you've been assigned a sexy personal Santa that has to obey you until Christmas is over, except...she's a cruel sadist that won't stop insulting you with a disgusted face

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • 6K+ words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 15+ unique character sprites

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
